recent_form_summary: Mired in a 4-5 match losing streak this swing, including an R1 exit at the French Open to Teichmann and a loss to Mertens in Berlin.
stat_trend_summary: Season aces/match ~3.7 (down from 4.9 career), 59.3% first-serve; no confirmed per-match grass box scores found this week.
opponent_factor_summary: Siniakova is an elite returner and leads the H2H 2-1 (2-0 on grass), which should suppress free points on serve.
injury_news: None found; only flag was an unrelated food-poisoning withdrawal in Madrid (Apr/May).
notes: Career/grass serve numbers support clearing 4.5, but the current form slump and a tough returner in Siniakova weigh against it; no real per-match ace values were found.
